title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
innovation_summary: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners: We introduce GenCeption, which leverages a pre-trained video generative diffusion backbone to define a feed-forward perception model, capable of performing various vision tasks steered by text.
